role: core learned candidate provider at detailed analytic candidate recall
interpretation: The integration is operational and preserves the analytic candidate frontier.
This benchmark already had complete analytic true-pair recall, so it cannot demonstrate JoinABLe recall gain.
The released checkpoint has no no-joint class and nominated false pairs; conservative downstream gates remain mandatory.
The next measurement target is a harder holdout with documented analytic prescreen misses.

gpu.local_cuda_failure: CUDA illegal instruction during final synchronization
gpu.rent_or_repair_gpu_trigger: larger batch inference after the hard-holdout graph set and ablation command are frozen
